The removed //fabrik:http:server and //fabrik:jobs:worker resolve as unknown
directives: fabrik is pre-1.0, so removed directives get no migration handling.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http:server
func Serve(h http.Handler) error { return nil }

//fabrik:jobs:worker
func Worker() error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: unknown directive "fabrik:http:server"
  help: known: assets, config, cron, hook, http, http:group, http:handle, http:methodnotallowed, http:middleware, http:notfound, http:static, job, migrations, provider, provider:select, templates, templates:func, web
error: web/web.go:8:1: unknown directive "fabrik:jobs:worker"
  help: known: assets, config, cron, hook, http, http:group, http:handle, http:methodnotallowed, http:middleware, http:notfound, http:static, job, migrations, provider, provider:select, templates, templates:func, web
